title: humata pusilla
intro: Humata pusilla, also known as the small marsh fern or Humata fern, is a type of aquatic fern native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The humata pusilla plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional remedies, such as poultices and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
